title: Information & Resources
text:
FOIA and Legal
About FOIA
The FOIA Statute
The federal government-wide FOIA website: https://www.foia.gov/ is the primary option for submitting FOIA requests to ONCD. However, requests may also be submitted directly to the ONCD by emailing FOIA@ncd.eop.gov.
Submitting a FOIA Request
NOTE: The White House Office is a separate component of the Executive Office of the President (EOP). If you wish to request information from the White House Office, you may do so at whitehouse.gov/contact. ONCD does not process FOIA requests for the White House Office.
For security reasons, ONCD does not accept or open attachments to emails submitted to the FOIA email inbox. ONCD will not respond to FOIA requests submitted as email attachments. Please transmit attachments by fax or postal mail, or include the information in the text body of the email.
ONCD’s FOIA regulations allow the agency to recover part of the costs associated with processing FOIA requests. Fee amounts vary based on a number of factors including the complexity of the request and the number of responsive documents. A request that results in no responsive documents may nonetheless incur a fee.
